name: S&P 500 Watcher

cards.name: S&P 500
cards.interpretation_en: S&P 500 fell 0.51% today; over the past month it is roughly flat (-0.3%).

cards.name: SPDR S&P 500 ETF
cards.interpretation_en: SPDR S&P 500 ETF fell 0.54% today; over the past month it is down (-0.5%).
cards.interpretation_ko: SPDR S&P 500 ETF 오늘 0.54% 하락 · 최근 1개월은 하락세(-0.5%)입니다.

cards.name: Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight
cards.interpretation_en: Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight rose 0.98% today; over the past month it is up (+1.0%).
cards.interpretation_ko: Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight 오늘 0.98% 상승 · 최근 1개월은 상승세(+1.0%)입니다.

diagnosis_en: S&P 500 Watcher: the index is above its 200-day moving average, so the primary trend is still up. Momentum is 0.3% over 1 month and 5.97% over 3 months, with RSI 55 in a neutral range. It sits 1.0% below its 52-week high. The 200-day line is the key level to watch — losing it would flip the primary trend. Equal-weight (RSP) is keeping pace: participation is broad.
diagnosis_ko: S&P 500 Watcher: 지수는 200일 이동평균선 위에 있어 1차 추세는 상승입니다. 모멘텀은 1개월 0.3%, 3개월 5.97%, RSI 55는 중립 구간입니다. 현재가는 52주 고점 대비 1.0% 아래입니다. 200일선이 핵심 분기점으로, 이 선을 내주면 1차 추세가 전환됩니다. 동일가중(RSP)이 보조를 맞춤: 참여가 광범위합니다.
